title: EQ - Button to change preset is present
scenario: EQ preset button displays Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ options in Device Settings with Bass as default
steps: Tap on a supported device name to open Device Settings
Observe the button below the EQ headline
expected: A button to change the EQ preset is present below the headline. The available presets are: Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ, with Bass set as the default.
